name: Papal States Intervention Force
description: Elite force commanded by a Trench Cleric. Fewer ducats but more Glory.
add_rules: Specialist Force: Start with 500D and 11 Glory (instead of 700D). Threshold Value reduced by 200D. Gain 4 Glory per Reinforcements.
Lector: 1 Trench Cleric is required and replaces the Lieutenant as LEADER.
Supreme Blessing: Supreme Pontiff's Crucifix is FREE at warband creation (must be given to one model). If lost, replacement costs Glory normally.
Swiss Guard: Lieutenant and up to 4 models gain NEGATE FEAR keyword for no extra cost.
Far from Home: Cannot include Trench Moles.
Arise and be Healed! ACTION: Trench Cleric can take this ACTION — Risky Success Roll. On Success, pick self or friendly within 3": stand up, remove up to D3 Blood/Infection Markers.
